top_signals.title: Inside Jay Powell’s turbulent eight years leading the Fed
top_signals.summary: Central bank chair’s tenure was marked by inflation shocks and his battle to protect the institution’s independence
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oil drops 5% as three supertankers attempt Strait of Hormuz crossing
top_signals.summary: Brent crude falls to $105 a barrel and vessels bound for China and South Korea raise hopes of resumption of energy flows
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Low Dollar Volatility Forces FX Traders Into Carry, Value Bets
top_signals.summary: A sharp drop in volatility in the US dollar is pushing traders in the $9.5-trillion-a-day currency market toward carry wagers and bets on relative value in search of profits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine probes teen suspect in cyber theft scheme targeting California online shoppers
top_signals.summary: The investigation began after U.S. authorities informed their Ukrainian counterparts that hackers operating from Ukraine could be involved in attacks targeting users of American e-commerce platforms, Ukraine's Prosecutor General said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Protocol: Ethereum Foundation's high-profile departures spark fresh debate
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
